data.title: Studio desk layout prototypes (scatter, masonry, columns, bento)

data.body: Four switchable layout prototypes for the /now studio desk page, selectable via query param (?layout=scatter|masonry|columns|bento). Scatter = current infinite canvas with dimension bug fixed. Masonry = Pinterest-style column flow. Columns = Open Metropolitan chunked 2-col masonry on pannable canvas. Bento = asymmetric editorial grid. All share the same content pipeline and popover detail view. Winner gets kept, losers deleted before merge to main.

data.reason: Splitting into individual prototype tasks (one per layout) + testing task per Julianna's direction

provenance.reason: Splitting into individual prototype tasks (one per layout) + testing task per Julianna's direction
